text:
1. I make 2 floppy
2. Boot
3. System detect SCSI controller with correct IRQ and addr. (no DMA)
4. "Waiting 15 sec. for SCSI device to settle" - syst message
And system waiting it uncertain time

Fix: 

Hardware working fine with NetBSD, OpenBSD, Solaris 7,Linux 2.2.x
How-To-Repeat: constantly
